name: 承德
description: Chengde, a historic mountain city in Hebei province, is famous for its imperial summer resort and nearby Buddhist temples. A UNESCO World Heritage Site, it was once the summer retreat for Qing Dynasty emperors. The mountain scenery and Tibetan-style Buddhist temples make it unique.
highlights: Mountain Resort - Qing Dynasty summer palace
Puning Temple - Largest Buddhist temple in China
Small Potala Palace - Miniature of Lhasa's Potala

climate.tips: Best in summer for resort and temples. Spring and autumn pleasant. Winters cold. Summer is peak season but pleasant escape from Beijing heat.

attractions.name: 避暑山庄
attractions.description: UNESCO World Heritage - vast imperial summer retreat covering 5.6 sq km with palaces, lakes and grasslands.
attractions.tips: Arrive early. Rent electric cart inside. Wear comfortable shoes. Full day attraction.

attractions.name: 普宁寺
attractions.description: Largest Buddhist temple in China, housing a 22-meter wooden Buddha statue carved from one tree.
attractions.tips: Watch monk debates if available. The Buddha statue is awe-inspiring. Light incense with care.

attractions.name: 普陀宗乘庙
attractions.description: Tibetan-style temple modeled after Lhasa's Potala Palace, also called 'Small Potala Palace'.
attractions.tips: Come for sunrise when golden. The scale is impressive. Allow 2-3 hours.

attractions.name: 须弥福寿庙
attractions.description: Temple modeled after Tibet's Tashilhunpo Monastery, built for the 6th Panchen Lama.
attractions.tips: Combine with Putuo Zongcheng Temple. Less crowded. Great photos.

attractions.name: 普乐寺
attractions.description: Temple with unique Indian-style architecture and the largest wooden monument in China.
attractions.tips: The wooden monument is impressive. Take photos from hilltop.

attractions.name: 磬锤峰
attractions.description: Dramatic 60-meter vertical rock formation, symbol of Chengde.
attractions.tips: Take cable car for views. Best at sunset. Wear hiking shoes.

attractions.name: 木兰围场
attractions.description: Historic imperial hunting ground, one of the largest in China.
attractions.tips: Half day from Chengde. Horse riding available. Experience Mongolian culture.

attractions.name: 金山岭长城
attractions.description: Well-preserved section of Great Wall with stunning mountain scenery, less crowded than Badaling.
attractions.tips: Great for hiking. Stay for sunset. Bring water. More rewarding than crowded sections.

attractions.name: 热河
attractions.description: Historic river flowing through Chengde, once important for the imperial resort.
attractions.tips: Combine with Mountain Resort visit. Evening walks pleasant.

attractions.name: 承德博物馆
attractions.description: Modern museum showcasing Qing Dynasty history and Chengde's cultural heritage.
attractions.tips: Learn background before visiting temples. Allow 2 hours.

attractions.name: 丽正门
attractions.description: Main gate of the Mountain Resort, an iconic symbol with bilingual inscription.
attractions.tips: First structure you see. Take photos with gate.

attractions.name: 离宫
attractions.description: Palace complex within the Mountain Resort where emperors lived and worked.
attractions.tips: Hire guide for history. Don't miss the main halls.

attractions.name: 如意岛
attractions.description: Lake island within the Mountain Resort with beautiful pavilions.
attractions.tips: Take boat to island. Beautiful at sunset. Peaceful.

attractions.name: 松鹤斋
attractions.description: Palace area within the resort featuring traditional Chinese gardens.
attractions.tips: The gardens are beautiful. Less crowded than main palace.

attractions.name: 万树园
attractions.nameEn: Wanshu Garden (Garden of Ten Thousand Trees)
attractions.description: Open grassland area within resort with thousands of old trees.
attractions.tips: Rent bike to tour. Watch for deer. Great for nature.

attractions.name: 二马道
attractions.description: Scenic road on the hillside offering views of temples and mountains.
attractions.tips: Best at sunset. Drive or hike up. Stunning views of temples.

attractions.name: 棒槌山
attractions.description: Another name for Qingchui Peak, the iconic rock formation.
attractions.tips: Take cable car up. Great hiking. Photo spot.

attractions.name: 太子河
attractions.description: River near Chengde offering scenic walks and boat rides.
attractions.tips: Evening boat ride is nice. Combine with dinner nearby.

attractions.name: 城隍庙
attractions.description: Historic temple dedicated to the city god with traditional architecture.
attractions.tips: Experience local religious culture. Combine with nearby streets.

attractions.name: 康熙温泉
attractions.description: Natural hot springs near the resort, historically used by emperors.
attractions.tips: Relax after sightseeing. The hot springs are authentic.

attractions.name: 外八庙
attractions.description: Group of eight Tibetan Buddhist temples outside the resort.
attractions.tips: Best temples are Putuo Zongcheng and Puning. Allow full day for all.

attractions.name: 魁星楼
attractions.description: Tower on hilltop offering panoramic views of Chengde city.
attractions.tips: Best at sunset or night. Take taxi up. Stunning photos.

attractions.name: 行宫
attractions.description: Secondary palace within the resort for imperial rest stops.
attractions.tips: The gardens are beautiful. Less crowded than main palace.

attractions.name: 文园
attractions.description: Classical Chinese garden within the resort showcasing Jiangnan style.
attractions.tips: Beautiful lotus in summer. Great for photos. Peaceful.

attractions.name: 避暑山庄
attractions.description: 中国最大的皇家园林，世界文化遗产，占地564万平方米。

attractions.name: 普陀宗乘之庙
attractions.description: 外八庙中最大的一座，仿西藏布达拉宫而建。

attractions.name: 普宁寺
attractions.description: 外八庙之一，有世界最大的木雕佛像千手千眼观音。

attractions.name: 普乐寺
attractions.description: 外八庙之一，有旭光阁等建筑。

attractions.name: 须弥福寿之庙
attractions.description: 外八庙之一，仿西藏扎什伦布寺而建。

attractions.name: 安远庙
attractions.description: 外八庙之一，仿新疆伊犁固尔扎庙而建。

attractions.name: 溥仁寺
attractions.description: 外八庙中最早建造的一座，有独特的汉藏结合建筑风格。

attractions.name: 殊像寺
attractions.description: 外八庙之一，仿五台山殊像寺而建。

attractions.name: 魁星楼
attractions.description: 承德市区的标志性建筑，始建于清道光年间。

attractions.name: 板城古镇
attractions.description: 承德北部的古镇，保留了清代建筑风格。

attractions.name: 雾灵山
attractions.description: 国家级自然保护区，海拔2118米，森林覆盖率93%。

attractions.name: 塞罕坝国家森林公园
attractions.description: 中国最大的人工林场，有百万亩林海。

attractions.name: 金山岭长城
attractions.description: 万里长城的精华段，保存最完好的明长城。

attractions.name: 丰宁坝上草原
attractions.description: 京北第一草原，距北京最近的天然草原。

attractions.name: 围场坝上草原
attractions.description: 清代皇家猎苑，有御道口等景区。

attractions.name: 承德博物馆
attractions.description: 展示承德历史和避暑山庄文化的博物馆。

attractions.name: 隆化董存瑞烈士陵园
attractions.description: 纪念战斗英雄董存瑞的陵园。

attractions.name: 承德夜景
attractions.description: 避暑山庄和外八庙的夜景灯光秀。

attractions.name: 宽城蟠龙湖
attractions.description: 人工湖，因形似蟠龙而得名，可乘船游览。

attractions.name: 隆化茅荆坝
attractions.description: 国家级自然保护区，有原始森林和高山草甸。

attractions.name: 平泉辽河源
attractions.description: 辽河源头，有原始森林和峡谷。

attractions.name: 御道口草原
attractions.description: 清代皇家猎苑的一部分，草原和森林交错。

attractions.name: 兴隆溶洞
attractions.description: 华北地区最大的溶洞之一。

attractions.name: 南营子大街
attractions.description: 承德最繁华的商业街，汇集各种特产和小吃。

attractions.name: 滦平长城
attractions.description: 滦平县境内的明长城，保存较好。

attractions.name: 万佛园
attractions.description: 有万尊佛像的园林，融合了佛教文化。

restaurants.name: 承德避暑山庄酒店中餐厅
restaurants.description: High-end restaurant serving refined imperial and local cuisine.

restaurants.name: 老满族饭庄
restaurants.description: Traditional Manchu restaurant serving local specialties.

restaurants.name: 鹿苑酒家
restaurants.description: Popular for venison and local game dishes.

restaurants.name: 蒙古营
restaurants.description: Mongolian restaurant with traditional decor and lamb dishes.

restaurants.name: 山庄面馆
restaurants.description: Local noodle shop near the resort.

restaurants.name: 香和居
restaurants.description: Upscale local restaurant with elegant atmosphere.

restaurants.name: 农家乐
restaurants.description: Home-style cooking with fresh local ingredients.

restaurants.name: 满族八大碗
restaurants.description: Traditional Manchu banquet dishes served in eight bowls.

restaurants.name: 驴肉火烧
restaurants.description: Donkey meat in crispy bread - famous local snack.

restaurants.name: 荞面碗砣
restaurants.description: Buckwheat jelly with sauce - traditional local snack.

restaurants.name: 莜面
restaurants.description: Traditional noodles made from highland barley.

restaurants.name: 蘑菇宴
restaurants.description: Various mushroom dishes from local forests.

restaurants.name: 烤全羊
restaurants.description: Traditional whole roasted lamb for groups.

restaurants.name: 坝上莜面
restaurants.description: Specialty noodles from Bashang region.

restaurants.name: 清真羊汤
restaurants.description: Rich lamb soup - popular breakfast spot.

restaurants.name: 承德凉粉
restaurants.description: Cool rice noodle snack with spicy sauce.

restaurants.name: 杏仁豆腐
restaurants.description: Sweet almond-flavored tofu dessert.

restaurants.name: 金地夜市
restaurants.description: Popular night market with variety of food.

restaurants.name: 蒙古奶茶馆
restaurants.description: Traditional Mongolian milk tea and snacks.

restaurants.name: 山庄农家乐
restaurants.description: Farm-to-table local cuisine near the resort.

arrival.tips: Sihui or Dongzhimen long-distance bus stations. Comfortable with AC.
Train is comfortable. Book ahead in peak season.

hotels.name: 承德避暑山庄希尔顿酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Book during peak season well ahead. Best location for sightseeing.

hotels.name: 承德绮望楼宾馆
hotels.bookingTips: Stay within the resort. Book well ahead for unique experience.

hotels.name: 承德盛华大酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Good value in city center. Book during off-peak.

hotels.name: 如家酒店承德避暑山庄店
hotels.bookingTips: Best budget option near main attractions.

hotels.name: 承德行宫大酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Good for temple visits. Book during off-peak.

hotels.name: 承德乾阳酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Good for transport connections. Book direct.

hotels.name: 承德山庄民宿
hotels.bookingTips: Experience local life. Book during off-peak season.

hotels.name: 承德文苑宾馆
hotels.bookingTips: Good for temple visits. Book during off-peak.

hotels.name: 承德天宝酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Good for temple tours. Book during off-peak.

hotels.name: 承德京都宾馆
hotels.bookingTips: Best value near attractions. Book in advance.

hotels.name: 承德元宝山酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Best budget option. Simple but convenient.

hotels.name: 承德温泉度假村
hotels.bookingTips: Perfect for relaxation. Book hot spring packages.

hotels.name: 承德草原度假营地
hotels.bookingTips: Experience Mongolian culture. Great for families.

hotels.name: 承德老街客栈
hotels.bookingTips: Experience local life. Great for cultural immersion.

culturalTips.title: Qing Dynasty Summer Retreat
culturalTips.content: Chengde was the summer retreat for Qing Dynasty emperors. The Mountain Resort served as a second capital, where emperors conducted government affairs away from Beijing's summer heat.

culturalTips.title: Tibetan Buddhism
culturalTips.content: The temples around Chengde reflect the importance of Tibetan Buddhism to the Qing court. The Potala-style temples were built to honor Tibetan Buddhist leaders.

culturalTips.title: Manchu Culture
culturalTips.content: Chengde is a center of Manchu culture. Try traditional Manchu dishes and experience the cultural heritage of the Qing ruling class.

culturalTips.title: Mountain Resort Design
culturalTips.content: The Mountain Resort incorporates natural mountain scenery into its design. The resort area includes lakes, grasslands and forests creating a microcosm of China.

culturalTips.title: Local Cuisine
culturalTips.content: Chengde cuisine reflects its northern location. Try wild mushrooms from nearby forests, venison, and traditional Manchu dishes like hotpot.

culturalTips.title: Gateway to Beijing
culturalTips.content: Chengde is a popular escape from Beijing's summer heat, just 3-4 hours by bus. Many Beijing residents visit for weekend retreats.

culturalTips.title: Nearby Great Wall
culturalTips.content: Jinshanling Great Wall is accessible from Chengde. This well-preserved section is less crowded than Badaling and great for hiking.

culturalTips.title: Mulan Weichang
culturalTips.content: The Mulan Weichang hunting ground near Chengde was used by Qing emperors for annual hunts. Today it offers grassland scenery and Mongolian cultural experiences.

culturalTips.title: Imperial Architecture
culturalTips.content: Chengde's Mountain Resort showcases unique imperial architecture combining Han and Mongolian styles. The temples feature golden roofs and Tibetan Buddhist design elements.

culturalTips.title: Northern Grasslands
culturalTips.content: The grasslands near Chengde offer a stark contrast to Beijing. The Mulan Weichang hunting ground spans vast grasslands where you can experience horse riding and Mongolian culture.

culturalTips.title: Wild Forest Mushrooms
culturalTips.content: Chengde's surrounding forests produce prized wild mushrooms. These are featured in local dishes and are considered a delicacy. Try mushroom hotpot at local restaurants.

culturalTips.title: Imperial Hot Springs
culturalTips.content: The hot springs near the Mountain Resort were used by Qing emperors. Today you can experience these same hot springs at local resorts.

culturalTips.title: Traditional Performances
culturalTips.content: Traditional Manchu and Mongolian performances are held at the Mountain Resort. These include folk dances, horse shows, and imperial ceremony reenactments.

culturalTips.title: Local Products
culturalTips.content: Chengde is known for wild mushrooms, pine nuts, and Chinese medicinal herbs. The night markets sell local specialties and traditional crafts.

culturalTips.title: Temple Etiquette
culturalTips.content: When visiting Buddhist temples, dress modestly and remove hats. Some temples may have restrictions on photography. Light incense with respect.

emergencyContacts.name: 承德医学院附属医院
emergencyContacts.nameEn: Affiliated Hospital of Chengde Medical College

emergencyContacts.name: 承德市中心医院
emergencyContacts.notes: Another major hospital in city center
